title: Continental-scale drivers of soil microbial extracellular polymeric substances
description: Across Europe, microbial extracellular polymers make up a small but vital share of soil carbon. Their levels vary with bedrock, land use, and climate, linking microbial activity, water deficit and soil structure to carbon storage.
